subject: Public Health
title: The Future of Mental Health Care
description: A quick win: understand The Future of Mental Health Care.

hook.text: Mental health care is at a turning point—new science, new technology, and new urgency converge.

buildup.text: Psychedelic-assisted therapy, AI-driven diagnostics, and precision psychiatry are reshaping treatment.

discovery.text: Psilocybin trials show remarkable results for treatment-resistant depression—with effects lasting months.

twist.text: The biggest breakthrough may be the simplest—community-based prevention rather than clinical treatment.

climax.text: The WHO's 2022 report calls for a fundamental shift from institutional to community mental health care.

punchline.text: The future of mental health is prevention, not just treatment.

quiz.question: What does the WHO's 2022 report call for in mental health care?
options: A shift from institutional to community-based care
